system: You are a static analysis assistant. You are tasked with identifying the variables assigned with SHA-512 MessageDigest objects and reporting them along with their line numbers
task:
I am going to detect unsalted hash bugs. I want you to identify MessageDigest objects created with the SHA-512 algorithm. Specifically, I want you to extract the left-hand side expressions (variables) assigned with the return values of MessageDigest.getInstance("SHA-512") calls. Think step by step and list pairs of a program line and a variable. 
 Specifically, you should first check whether MessageDigest.getInstance("SHA-512") is invoked in the code snippet. If no, you can just finish the analysis and do not report any variables or expressions. If MessageDigest.getInstance("SHA-512") is invoked, please list the variables assigned with the return values along with the corresponding line numbers.

examples.description: List the variables assigned with SHA-512 MessageDigest objects.
examples.code:
1. MessageDigest hash = MessageDigest.getInstance("SHA-512");
2. MessageDigest hash2 = MessageDigest.getInstance("SHA-256");
examples.question: Please examine the method invocations in the code snippet. Check whether MessageDigest.getInstance("SHA-512") is invoked. If so, please list the variables assigned with the return values along with the corresponding line numbers.

output.explanation: The method MessageDigest.getInstance is invoked at line 1 with the argument "SHA-512", and the return value is assigned to the variable hash. At line 2, MessageDigest.getInstance is invoked with "SHA-256", which is not SHA-512, so we do not report hash2. Hence, I will only report the variable hash at line 1.
